summary: The 'Run prettier' CI job failed because two files in the PR were not formatted with prettier. The prettier check script detected unformatted code and exited with code 1.
root_cause: Two files were not formatted with prettier: 'packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js' and 'compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts'. The prettier check script (node ./scripts/prettier/index.js) detected the formatting violations and exited with code 1.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
    Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The prettier check script explicitly reported that files need formatting and instructed the developer to run yarn prettier-all.
This file was identified by the prettier check as not being properly formatted.
This file was identified by the prettier check as not being properly formatted.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The yarn prettier-check command exited with code 1, causing the CI job to fail.
GitHub Actions reported the step as failed due to the non-zero exit code from the prettier check.

suggested_fix: Run 'yarn prettier-all' locally, then add the reformatted versions of 'packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js' and 'compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts' to the commit.
